top_signals.title: Nippon Life Books Its First Impairment Loss in Current Bond Rout
top_signals.summary: Nippon Life Insurance Co. booked an impairment loss on its Japanese government bonds, signaling that some of the paper losses on the debt holdings have climbed to levels that require writedowns.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Sri Lanka Took Steps to Boost Dollar Liquidity, Governor Says
top_signals.summary: Sri Lanka’s central bank took steps to boost dollar liquidity in the interbank market as part of a series of measures to curb excessive depreciation in the rupee, Governor Nandalal Weerasinghe said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
